capabilities.name: Violation detection sweep
capabilities.verify: Sweep ported to SQL 2026-07-07: run_sla_sweep RPC (sla_check skill flipped edge:sla-check → rpc:run_sla_sweep; edge function now a thin delegate). Same open/auto-resolve semantics, business-hours clock, plus tiers/pauses/priority filters (migration 20260708030000). Stage-3 live via gateway.

capabilities.name: Escalation actions on breach
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. sla_policies.escalation_actions jsonb + manage_sla_escalation RPC/skill (set/get/clear, action validation) + apply_sla_escalation AFTER INSERT trigger on sla_violations: bump_priority (ticket low→medium…), notify (emit_platform_event sla.violation.escalated), create_task (crm_tasks, high, due +1d), accrue_credit (service_credits) — per-action error isolation, results in escalation_log + escalated_at (migration 20260708030000). Stage-3 live: all four actions fired on a real sweep breach and logged.

capabilities.name: Business-hours calendar
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface + consumer DONE 2026-07-06. Config: business_hours + business_holidays tables, business_minutes_between() function, manage_business_hours skill (Stage-3 live: set_hours/add_holiday), Business Hours admin tab in SlaMonitorPage. CONSUMER wired (commit 74495ace): sla-check now measures elapsed on business minutes when a schedule exists (wall-clock fallback otherwise) — verified live Fri 18:00→Sat 10:00 = 0 business min (wall-clock 960), Fri→Mon 09:30 = 120.
capabilities.notes: Fully closed 2026-07-06: admin UI + skill + sla-check consumer all use working-hours minutes. A Friday-evening ticket no longer breaches over the weekend.

capabilities.name: Compliance dashboards
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: sla_compliance_report RPC (violations opened/resolved/open, avg_overage_ratio, escalations fired, credits accrued, by-entity compliance % from entities created vs breached, severity breakdown; migration 20260708030000) — Stage-3 live: ticket compliance 0% vs chat/lead/order/booking 100% reported. UI: Compliance tab in SlaMonitorPage (Lovable build 2026-07-07).

capabilities.name: Remediation workflow
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. manage_sla_remediation RPC/skill (open/complete/list): open creates a high-priority crm_tasks row linked via sla_violations.remediation_task_id; complete closes both sides with a note (migration 20260708030000). Stage-3 live: remediation opened + completed on the sweep's test violation.

capabilities.name: Severity-based thresholds
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. run_sla_sweep treats policy.priority ≠ 'all' as an entity-priority FILTER for tickets/chats (previously only a severity label) and labels severity from the entity priority when policy is 'all' (migration 20260708030000). Stage-3 live: low-priority test ticket breached with severity 'low'.

capabilities.name: Per-customer SLA tiers
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. sla_tiers (threshold_multiplier) + sla_tier_assignments (company_id | customer_email, one tier per customer) + manage_sla_tier RPC/skill; run_sla_sweep multiplies thresholds by sla_tier_multiplier(company,email) — company match beats email (migration 20260708030000). Stage-3 live: gold-r6 (×0.5) assigned to test email → violation opened at threshold_minutes 30 instead of 60.

capabilities.name: Clock-stop on waiting
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. sla_clock_pauses + manage_sla_clock RPC/skill (pause/resume/list, one open pause per entity) + auto-pause trigger on tickets.status='waiting' (resumes on leaving waiting); sweep subtracts sla_paused_minutes measured on the same clock (business hours aware) (migration 20260708030000). Stage-3 live: ticket→waiting auto-paused, skill resume closed the pause.

capabilities.name: Service-credit accounting
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. service_credits table + manage_service_credit RPC/skill (accrue/apply/waive/list with total_accrued_cents) + automatic accrual via escalation action accrue_credit (customer resolved from the entity) (migration 20260708030000). Stage-3 live: 5000 öre credit auto-accrued on breach, then applied via skill.
